description: Configurable C0-C4 causal evidence reviewer for formal GWAS/QTL/coloc/MR outputs. Legacy A/B/C/D triage is retained only as a compatibility field.

grade_rules.rationale: MR and colocalization evidence are both present.
Colocalization evidence is present; review locus and QTL context.
Genome-wide significant association-level evidence is present.
Only association-level or database genetic evidence is available.

C4.rationale: Coloc and MR support are both present with acceptable proxy sensitivity.

C3.rationale: Coloc or cis-MR support is present and sensitivity flags are reviewable.

C2.rationale: Genetic support is present but sensitivity, LD, or method completeness limits interpretation.

C1.rationale: Association or database genetic evidence is present without reliable coloc/MR support.

C0.rationale: No reliable formal genetic causal support is available.

review_policy: All automated causal grades require human/statistical review before scientific claims.
limitation: Automated causal grade is a triage label; locus mapping, LD, pleiotropy, and ancestry matching require human/statistical review.
